name: tet-atf-knowledge
description: Knowledge bundle for the TET-ATF (Test Enablement Team Automated Test Framework) skeleton. Packages 14 independently-activating skills covering framework architecture, layer rules, tag system, utilities catalog, coding standards, API/Web/Mobile patterns, test isolation, logging/reporting, security configuration, CI/CD pipelines, Kubernetes user secrets, and Playwright CLI. Skills activate only when their specific topic is relevant, keeping Claude's context as small as possible.
